The '''Hejaran Castle''' was the stronghold of the [[Hejaran family]] of [[House Mecetti]]. It was located on [[Nightsinger's Orb]], the [[Moon/Legends|moon]] of the [[Planet/Legends|planet]] [[Pella]] in the [[Tapani sector/Legends|Tapani sector]]. Members of this House would visit for the readings of wills and to plot murders of other feuding family members.
